{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211414028498077F99D0284A57A7"}"},"total":1381},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7481694601819472702","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"男主表现得很睿智聪明，案件也很有趣，就是感觉作者太热情，爱回复段评，每次看到悬疑点想点进评论区发表自己看法，就看见作者在评论区现身说法，然后我好多感慨直接被打断施法[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741976061,"group_id":"7428080274644159512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+zJ5onuLVi/smmVdyb7zC0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3ffd76d7b9984f588e244ba8841bfcc2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619187&x-signature=hji1J5eswJnyte2JuFgc6HabVk4%3D","user_id":"102464970457","user_name":"呃...叫什么都行"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102464970457","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742174417,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428080274644159512","book_info":{"abstract":"《白夜追凶》远房表弟篇。
【破案+推理+单元剧+非爽文】
十年前，林二以杀人罪遭冤枉入狱；出来后又来？历史又要重演？
不！我已经不是十年前的我了……
连环案、灭门案、投毒案、碎尸案、山神案……
没有我破不了的案！
不是，坐牢十年，你咋成神探了？
呵呵，你当我在监狱十年是白混的？哥，也是有金手指的人……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6006b2eca776f1830067b87ff5bde46f","author":"千夜林一","author_id":"","book_id":"7428080274644159512","book_name":"坐牢十年，你咋成神探了","book_short_name":"千夜追凶","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7428179711236260376","read_count":"72021","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3329758"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1548","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,多女主,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/39070161f2c3f1846dcf61b2a4b6d3f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257643&x-signature=XGBLam4yOtJLVpGvD6HPu12d9Wg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6027626652","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"691"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211414028498077F99D0284A57A7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":99604,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":165650,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10157},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1742014068,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537502679996908312","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此文值得推荐一款适合自己的想法不一样传说。[笑][笑][笑][赞][赞][赞]冇矿科长把老婆分尸了扔大河里，找不到了。前段时间漂下一段尸体但不是的。此市那么多大案？把全国各地的案件集中，有精彩的挑出来分享给你给我。😊😁😊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754965824,"group_id":"7428080274644159512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"服过兵役、当过工人，公司职员至今。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyDtJJSVdGTDsoHTOs0NsutkljxiVBnKs79XosSJHLrS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3940270025476383","user_name":"用户39402700"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3940270025476383","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1671537595,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428080274644159512","book_info":{"abstract":"《白夜追凶》远房表弟篇。

挑剔式十分制打分（目前进度：看到52%，估算212章）
题材贴合【8】  剧情发展【7】 人物塑造【6】  情感共鸣【6】 文笔【6】
综合打分：6.6分
推荐度：还是不错的，铺垫的比较多，需要比较有耐心，不然容易像我半途放弃。缺点就是没有什么波澜起伏，有点平稳，感觉是要放长线钓大鱼，但是中间等待的时间太长了，阅读感上的憋屈。挺喜欢作者这种分卷式目录，很有感觉，作者加油✊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741266776,"group_id":"7428080274644159512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说能跳过不想看的章节，人生可以吗？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1tvcpqnz5ZVq9MkQvLTjks=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9188d029fe34720a1246a4d07feccbf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618582&x-signature=C4ER%2BRczQNOhDZmhKLx0%2FWio2mw%3D","user_id":"3517122806","user_name":"白蝘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3517122806","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428080274644159512","book_info":{"abstract":"《白夜追凶》远房表弟篇。
